title: Erie Indemnity and Penske Automotive Group Set to Join S&P MidCap 400
text: NEW YORK , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices will make the following changes to the S&P MidCap 400: Penske Automotive Group Inc. (NYSE: PAG) will replace Univar Solutions Inc. (NYSE: UNVR) in the S&P MidCap 400 effective prior to the opening of trading on Friday, August 4. Apollo Global Management Inc. (NYSE: APO) acquired Univar Solutions in a deal that closed today.
